reviews.title: Great for Sensitive Gums and Teeth
reviews.text:
I was told by my dentist to switch toothbrushes from manual to Oral-B electric toothbrush because it stops brushing when you brush too hard and keeps your enamel in tact, which helps relieve sensitive teeth. The dentist also recommended Oral-B because it was a good price point and has great features like a timer for 2 minutes and gets really close to the gum to get rid of icky plaque. Since I have been using Oral-B, he has noticed that I no longer have any plaque build up between cleanings and my sensitive teeth are gone. He also says my teeth look whiter and brighter. I love the toothbrush because it is light and easy to hold and get to those hard to reach places in the back of your mouth. It also leaves your teeth feeling extremely clean compared to a manual toothbrush. I can never go back to a regular toothbrush now because I tried on vacation once and felt absolutely disgusting in comparison. Oral-B is definitely the way to go for a clean mouth feel!

mouthwashes to ACT Restoring because it restores enamel that is weak and will alleviate sensitivity and use Glide Comfort Floss. Boy, was she correct. After just a few days of using the mouthwash I no longer feel that uncomfortable sensation on my teeth. I also am no longer needing prescription strength toothpaste. I now use this mouthwash twice daily and floss once a day, in combination with Sensodyne's Repair and Protect toothpaste. My gums do not bleed when I floss and I don't dread flossing. Glide floss goes easily between even the tightest teeth and has a lovely mint flavor that helps freshen breath at the same time. Changing the floss and mouthwash have made a huge improvement and now I can eat hot or cold foods without wincing in pain.

reviews.title: I’m pleased with it
reviews.text: It’s a good tooth brush..it takes a little getting used to because I’m accustomed to a bigger brush head..but it works great.

reviews.title: Amazing Price and Works Great!
reviews.text:
First off, this toothbrush is so pretty. I ordered the Green, which is really a deep turquoise with attractive, shiny gold accents. It's lightweight but feels substantial, not at all cheap. It also comes with a whopping eight (8) brush heads, which is enough for 2 years. Amazing. I also really like the brush size. Many brushes are too big for adequate brushing, but this is a really nice size. The bristles are not overly stiff, so they don't irritate my gums.

Everything with this brush is powered by a single button, pushed multiple times to change modes and held down to turn off manually. Clean mode lasts 2 minutes with a pause every 30 seconds to change quadrants before finally turning off on its own. Additional modes are Polish (I googled to discover that this helps remove stains and shine teeth post brushing), Milder (for sensitive teeth), White (whitening), and Gum Care/Massage. Obviously, the vibration makes a sound, but it's on par with the loudness of other electric toothbrushes I have used

A really nice feature is that this does not require a separate charging base. The charging cord is built right into the base (which means you cannot lose it) and accessed by twisting and removing the gold piece at the bottom, and it plugs into any USB port. When charging is complete, the USB sticks back into a slot, and the base twists back on. A full charge is expected to last 45 days, though I haven't had it long enough to know if that pans out yet!

Overall, this is a high-quality electric toothbrush that has everything you could possibly need. I'm really happy with it.

reviews.title: Vibrates vigorously
reviews.text: This toothbrush is charged by a USB cord that comes from the bottom.  Its cord is approximately 3.5 inches.  When it is charging, it blinks red and then goes to solid red when fully charged.  It comes with 8 brushes and has 5 settings. It took me a little bit to get used to because it vibrates more than any toothbrush I have ever used.  I guess that is why it is called a sonic toothbrush.  After using it several times I am now used to it, and it does do a very good job at cleaning my teeth.  I have been using it about a week and so far, I only charged it the one time.

Going electric might feel like a big step, but with this brush you’re in safe hands. Its slim ergonomic design and familiar-shaped head gives you everything you need for an effective clean. title: COSLUS Kids Sonic Rechargeable Electric Toothbrush: Interactive Smart LED Light Toddler Silicone Tooth Brush (Bluelue)
features: 🌟INTERACTIVE FUN BRUSHING: Featuring cute cartoon character design and rainbow LED lights, COSLUS electric toothbrush makes brushing more fun and easier for boys and girls ages 3+. Your children will be rewarded with a star after each successful brushing, which can motivate them to collect all the stars, fall in love with brushing teeth, and enjoy endless fun with cute characters. Studies show that 93% of parents prefer an interactive toothbrush to develop their child's healthy brushing habits

⏰BUILDS HEALTHY BRUSHING HABITS: Based on the professional advice of brushing teeth twice a day for two minutes each time, COSLUS toothbrush sets the smart timer to 2min and lightly vibrates every 30 seconds to remind child to switch to another part of the teeth, thoroughly clean their oral, and develop correct habits. Meanwhile, our toothbrush has 3 cleaning modes with memory function: deep clean, soft clean and massage, you can choose the right mode according to your child's needs

✔️GENTLE & EFFECTIVE CLEANING: Created in partnership with thousands of Professionals, COSLUS kids toothbrush is safe, effective and gentle on incoming teeth and sensitive gums. Ultra-low vibration, children will not feel numb when using. What's more, this toothbrush vibrates up to 31000 times/min, 100% more powerful than ordinary electric toothbrushes. And Come with 2 toothbrush heads: 1 soft bristle for sensitive gums, 1 standard bristle for deep cleaning

🎁Designed For Kids' Oral Development: The unique caterpillar-shaped silicone handle is comfortable and non-slip, more suitable for children's small hands. And widened tongue brush head is made of food-grade silicone to massage kids' tongue while cleaning effectively. In addition, the lock-type design can better prevent brush head from falling off, allowing kids to brush more safely independently. With IPX7 waterproof design, your children can directly rinse and soak it with water after brushing

⚡90 Days Long Endurance: This rechargeable kids electric toothbrush lasts up to 90 days after 2.5 hours of wireless charging, more convenient and faster. It highly reduces the hassle of frequent charging and battery replacement, easy to use at home and on the go. In addition, the average lifespan of our electric toothbrush is approximately 3 years, which is double the lifespan compared to other electric toothbrush

Tips: It is recommended to replace the brush head every three months. ---You can check the related information on the box, get 3 replacement brush heads --- Or buy other brush head sets at the COSLUS store to better experience this electric toothbrush

reviews.title: My grandson actually wants to brush now.
reviews.text:
This brush is fun, and my grandson actually wants to brush since we picked it up.

Brush vibrates quietly, bristles are stationary. As you brush the stars light up.
The goal is to brush long enough to get all the stars lit up.
When you change something into a game, it motivates kids to try to "win".

I like the concept. Charger and extra brush head included.

reviews.title: Great for my daughters toothbrush
reviews.text: We got the actual toothbrush a few months back and although it came with an extra head we wanted to be prepared because it is the only toothbrush my daughter likes to use.  They came packaged just fine and we got all three in perfect shape.  They are like her old heads for the toothbrush, not too hard and not too soft and they fit perfectly.  As long as my daughter still enjoys her specific tooth brush I will keep getting these for her.

reviews.title: great rechargeable
reviews.text: Recharges and lasts!  Great smart brush and idea for little ones to encourage a good brush and early hygiene!  love the different heads and cute design!  great for all ages to get that deep clean!

reviews.title: Great smart brush
reviews.text: Great smart brush and idea for little ones to encourage a good brush and early hygiene!  love the diffrent heads and cute design!  great for all ages to get that deep clean!

reviews.title: My daughter loves it
reviews.text: This brush comes in nice packaging. It has 3 levels of brushing. My daughter loves to play around with different levels. It encourages her to brush her teeth every day. The brush is soft and the handle is easy ti grip. I could not ask for more. 5 stars for sure.

title: Toothbrush Marker by CUPmarker - Set of 6 Reusable & Adjustable Toothbrush Labels for Standard Toothbrushes
description: Set of six (6) toothbrush markers by CUPmarker in assorted colors. No more mix-ups! Pick a color and slide it on to your toothbrush to make your toothbrush uniquely identifiable. These reusable toothbrush markers help to label and personalize toothbrushes of varying sizes.They are an excellent choice for home, travel, dorms and other group settings. Mix and match toothbrush markers to create a unique and personalized look or use individually.
features: Set of 6 toothbrush markers by CUPmarker (assorted colors).
Stretches to fit on toothbrush handles of varying sizes .
Our reusable toothbrush markers are made of food-safe materials.
Low-profile minimalist label design offers excellent toothbrush grip and comfort.
Personalize further by mixing and matching colors or writing on it using a permanent marker for large groups.

reviews.title: Worked for my purpose
reviews.text: My husband and I share an electric toothbrush and usually the toothbrush heads come with different colors but sometimes we get stuck with all the same ones so I wanted something else to mark them. They were a little small to fit on the oral b toothbrush head but I managed to get them on.

reviews.title: Five Stars if it suits your needs.
reviews.text:
First of all, the base color was supposed to be black and it is what they call black, but it’s kind of a copper a metallic black not a true black.
The design is compact and it works very well.
I even like the little cord holder that comes with it as it’s very ergonomically designed.
The unit works just fine for my sonicare by Phillips.
I happen to have the one with a glass. After using this a couple of days I realized I like the look of the glass better than I like this.
On the other hand, if you have a very small space in which to put it on your sink, you may prefer something with a smaller silhouette; the footprint is the same, but it’s just not as big a presence because you don’t have the height and width of the glass.

reviews.title: Just as original
reviews.text: I got this to replace mu original charger for electric toothbrush, it looks just like it and so far, it has been working as the original, would recommend.

reviews.title: Great replacement or spare charger for Sonicare
reviews.text:
I really like my Sonic Care toothbrush and take it anywhere. So getting a second charger was a no-brainer.
I chose the gold colored base and it really looks nice.

It works just like the original and comes with the clear plastic holder, but you can also use the glass cup on it if you like. The cable is nice and long and I like that it comes in black, which fits better with some décor. I think there are some choices in regard to color of the base and cable.

Nothing bad to say about them.
perfect for travel or if you have a second home and don't want to constantly take the charger with you; and of course as a replacement.

title: AutoBrush Silicone U Shaped Brush Head Replacement, Adult and Kid Sizes (Ages 3-4, 3-Pack, Kids)
features: MADE WITH FOOD-GRADE SILICONE: Rest easy knowing that our u-shaped brush head replacements are crafted from premium food-grade silicone, ensuring they're 100% safe and free from harmful chemicals like BPA, phthalates, and PVC
COMPATIBLE WITH ALL AUTOBRUSHES: All sizes of AutoBrush brush heads are compatible with all AutoBrush brush bodies, we recommend replacing them every 3 months

ADA-APPROVED BASS TECHNIQUE: Each brush head features the ADA-approved BASS technique that ensures bristles hit your teeth at a 45° angle with up to 30,000 pulses per minute to effectively fight plaque
SUSTAINABLE: Every order is packaged in recyclable cardboard and carbon offset with our environmentally friendly partners

SENSORY FRIENDLY: For individuals with oral sensitivities that may make it difficult to use toothbrushes with nylon bristles, our silicone bristle option offers a perfect solution that provides gentle yet effective oral care

AMERICAN-BASED COMPANY: Headquartered in San Diego, AutoBrush is the pioneer of the whole-mouth sonic toothbrush whose goal is to simplify and enhance the brushing experience for everyone, including children, adults, those with disabilities, and individuals with sensory sensitivities

reviews.title: Works well, but supplement with traditional brushing.
reviews.text: These replacement mouth pieces work very well, but we found them to run slightly small. Once we got the proper size, they reached every tooth in our 7 year old's mouth easily.

reviews.title: Not like auto brush. Smaller sizes
reviews.text: This looks nothing like the autobrush head I got straight from the company. The size is smaller as well.  My kids are 6 and 9 yr and niether the size 5/7 or 8/10 fit their mouths.

title: SVITOO Infant Toddler Toothbrush, 2 Pcs Toddler Training Teeth Brushes with Thousands of Soft Bristles, Children Oral Care for Sensitive Gums for 12 Months to 6 Years Babies, Prevent Stuck Throat
features: 【SVITOO Baby/Children Toothbrush】Specially designed for babies and children aged 1-6 years. Food grade materials have passed FDA testing. Creative and lovely toothbrush is a gift for children

【10000 Fine Soft Bristles - Soft Rubber Brush Head】the center of the brush head adopts tens of thousands of bristles, which is very soft and dense. It is our unique design, which can better clean the baby's teeth and mouth. The outer soft silicone brush head has the effect of massaging gums

【Safety baffle】The bear shaped block can attract children, prevent the toothbrush from going too deep into the baby's mouth, prevent the brush head from lying flat on the table and keep it clean. This is creative toothbrush

【Easy to Clean】Polymer nanomaterials can reduce bacterial reproduction and are easy to clean. You only need to wash with warm water after use. We recommend changing it once a month is better for your baby. Any questions, feel free to contact us.

reviews.title: Soft for gums and tiny teeth.
reviews.text: Cute little tooth brush for babies to learn with. Not going to hurt gums if they start to chew on it. Can see a two year old learning to brush well after tries as a baby with this safe brush.

reviews.title: Love the design
reviews.text: Its so cute and the bristles are soft so its perfect for a toddler.

reviews.title: Great size...
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are the perfect size for toddlers.  The bristles are soft and the handle is made of a combination of hard plastic and silicone, so it’s easy to grip.  The optional silicone guard is perfect for helping little ones learn how to control the brush.  And, each brush has a suction cup on the end of the handle, so it’s easy to stand them up in the bathroom counter.  My only issue is that one of the brushes got smashed during delivery and the silicone guard is bent inwards...it will probably pop out in time, so really only a minor issue.  Overall, nice infant to toddler toothbrushes!

reviews.title: One of my favorite toddler toothbrushes
reviews.text: I really love how theses have the guards. My nephew has special needs so while he's 8, he physically is like an infant. We are teaching him how to hold a toothbrush and brush his own teeth. This is great because he always puts too much in his mouth and ends up choking. If you have a new leader to brushing teeth this is most definitely will be your saving grace.

title: Pop Sonic Electric Toothbrush with Travel Case (Teal) - Soft Electric Toothbrushes Keeps Mouth Fresh All-Day Toothbrush w/ 2 Speed - 18,000-24,000 Strokes/Minute Vibrations
features: Portable Electric Toothbrush With Case: Our battery operated toothbrush for adults and kids keeps your mouth fresh all day. This kit includes 1 x soft bristle electric toothbrush handle, 2 x Brush Heads with Nylon Bristles, 1 x Toothbrush Case, One AAA Battery, & Instruction Manual.

Gives Perfect Strokes: Our tooth brushes for teeth electric feature 2 speeds (to control your cleaning) with vibrations from 18,000 to 24,000 brush strokes per minute. These electric travel toothbrushes contain an easy-to-use on / off switch.

Styling Carrying Case: This portable toothbrush electric comes with its own carrying case making travel toothbrushes ideal for on-the-go oral care. The stylish electric toothbrush carrying case protects from unclean surfaces and avoids spillage from a wet toothbrush after use.

Great for Kids Too: With our whitening toothbrush, handy carrying case, and selection of bright colors, kids will love the Go Plus Sonic Toothbrush. Perfectly sized electric toothbrush for kids 8-12 or above that fits smaller hands for younger, more sensitive mouths.

Durable, Develop Healthy Brushing Habits: These oral hygiene products are programmed with a quadrant pacer and a 2-minute timer. Our travel electric toothbrushes for adults and kids are made with high-quality and long-lasting DuPont nylon bristles for longer life.

reviews.title: Nice toothbrush with a travel case
reviews.text: Nice toothbrush with a travel case. The vibrations are weaker than expected.  I like the timer.  We'll see if the dentist notices a difference.

reviews.title: Great toothbrush to take for travel
reviews.text: I hate when having to choose to use a regular stationary toothbrush, or my big rechargeable toothebrush when traveling. This toothbrush was perfect to take with me on my last trip as it is small, lightweight, sleek with the rose gold design, and comes with a really nice and compact case. Another huge plus is that it is really very quiet when it is on, so you don't risk having to wake others up. It is a great choice for a travel toothbrush.

reviews.text: This is really just a vibrating toothbrush.

reviews.title: I really love it
reviews.text: This toothbrush is perfect in every possible way.

title: N-amboo Super Hard Toothbrush Bamboo Toothbrush Large Brush Head Manual Toothbrsuh Hard Bristles Pack of 4
description: Super Hard Bristles,More Cleaning Bamboo toothbrush,eco-friendly Large brush head

reviews.title: High quality bamboo toothbrush, worth the money!
reviews.text:
I was looking for a more sustainable toothbrush to replace the plastic ones I've been using forever. I found out about bamboo toothbrushes and I had to try them.

What I really like about these is how big the heads on them are. The wood is nice and smooth and it's easy to hold. I also prefer firm toothbrushes and picked these specifically because they were marked as "super hard" - and they really do live up to the name, because they were actually a little too hard for me. (I suspect I was brushing too hard since I'm used to different types of brushes, so it's just something I have to get used to.) I'm not knocking down the rating on that, though, because they were true to their advertising. :)

Very good brushes. I plan to buy them again.

reviews.title: These are HARD
reviews.text:
UPDATE: these ended up making my tongue bleed quite a bit. Why you’d need this type of brush for your mouth… I have no idea. Can’t return cause I used it. Otherwise I would , so I think I’ll use them for a teeny bonfire.

I will preface this by saying I use an electric oral b cross action toothbrush . I got these to brush my tongue . And the toothbrush is HARD. Like it made my tongue bleed. Idk who is using this for their teeth lol be careful if u are. It worked amazing for the purpose I got it for but just be cautious.

title: Sound Feelings Toothbrush - Basic, KIDS, 4-Pack, Extra-Soft
description: Our kids plain toothbrush is perfect for little ones who are just learning to brush their teeth. The bristles are of the same stiffness as our “x-soft” adult model but instead of 47 tufts, they have just 24 tufts. Though we call it our “kids” brush, many adults actually like the control they have with the smaller cleaning surface that this brush provides. 4 toothbrushes per pack. This is NOT a flimsy "disposable" style toothbrush. It is a quality, x-soft-bristle toothbrush with a solid handle like you grew up with. All the bristles are at the same level for the most even cleaning capability. Compare to the older style GUM, Colgate and Just the Basics from CVS brands. No crazy "ergonomic" handles. No multi-color bristles. No varying-length bristles. No bent heads. Just a well-made classic toothbrush! Because the Sound Feelings toothbrush has a traditional flat top, it actually makes better surface contact with all surfaces within your mouth than "modern" multilevel brushes." All toothbrushes are INDIVIDUALLY-WRAPPED in cellophane for maximum sterility. Certified BPA-free, Phthalate-free. Please search on Amazon for ALL VERSIONS of our toothbrushes from Sound Feelings: Soft, Extra Soft, Medium, Hard, Extra-Hard and Kids, or Sampler, if you aren't sure.
features: Pack of 4 old-fashioned, classic toothbrushes for KIDS
End-rounded nylon bristles
Flat, small head with narrow neck
24 tufts of X-SOFT bristles. Length 6.25" Red, Yellow, Green, Blue (colors may vary). Made in USA
This low-cost item not eligible for Prime

reviews.title: I am one of those people that can't stand the ...
reviews.text: I am one of those people that can't stand the feel of soft bristled toothbrushes.  I am therefore stuck looking all over to find one of the medium bristled ones.  I have finally found one that feels right and leaves my teeth feeling clean without making my gums bleed.

reviews.title: Clean away
reviews.text: brushes my teeth every day. deserves 5*

reviews.title: Good delivery but poore choice by the packager
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. I often use this brand and style it holds up very well, however I did not like the fact that they sent a guy a pink toothbrush.

reviews.title: Very good travel toothbrush when your sonic is at home.
reviews.text: or when the rest of the family is asleep and you don't want the noisy electric brush to wake them up. The thick handle and light weight is ideal for the elderly or those with arthritis making a tight grip harder to do. I like the medium brush better than the soft bristle, with the medium you don't have to brush as hard for clean teeth and as long as you aren't grinding the bristles into your mouth your gums should not become stressed. With the soft bristle, while ideal for gums, my teeth don't feel as clean.

reviews.title: Polishing star takes some getting used to
reviews.text:
I'm not sure the polishing star is really more effective than normal bristles if you do a good job of brushinganyway, and it is a but squeaky on my teeth and can rub the gums the wrong way if you are careless in brushing.

That said, the medium bristles are effective and not too hard, and I did like the head size, handle grip and overall effectiveness.
